reviews.review_title: Not as good as the first!
reviews.review_description: I downloaded this some time ago thinking it would be like the original one where it has all the doors to either a scary boy, a door to spiders, snakes... etc. I don't feel like its like "facing my fears" anymore, but more like a story line like any other horror game. Why is the original not available now??
Please bring back the original face your fears! Please, please, please!!

When i was first introduced to face your fears
It was pick your fear and you experience that fear standing there. Number two is okay, but I really liked number one because they had a fear of spiders' room.They had a fear of height's room.They had a fear of pottergeist, which was really cool because you were stuck in a bed like you were a kid, and you were looking around a room with creepy stuff happening.This one.You travel around a haunted house which I believe has been done too much.Bring back the first face your fears

reviews.review_title: Bring back the old one this one is trash
reviews.review_description: BRING BACK THE OLD ONE

I not one for writing reviews so I'll keep this short. 

Face your fears sequel is honestly the best vr horror experience I have ever witnessed, and everyone I know says the same.

I have recently downloaded Face your fears 2 without checking reviews, as I like to make my own mind on games before delving in to other people's experiences, and again it has the jump scares, good visuals and immersive gameplay.

The only thing I will say is, it's missing the stationary aspect witnessed from the orignal face your fears sequel (number 1) which was amazing.

Please add/create other doors with this type of scenario, stationed in one spot like the original, or, BRING BACK FACE YOUR FEARS 1 😁.

Give the people what they want, PLEASE and thank you.

Edit: Not sure what fixed it, was it the developers or the  new system update? Whatever it was after version 81 the game suddenly worked as intended and I got to experience the last five minutes of the game. Overall a solid game, but that bug ruined it for me somewhat.

Original review: There's a game breaking bug with the final boss of the 1983 story that makes you super slow while moving between platforms. You need your regular movement speed though to dodge attacks. So you can't see how the story ends.

reviews.review_title: Not as good as the original.
reviews.review_description: I HATE that they did not port the original Face your Fears into the newer Quest . It was such a great showcase for VR. It was my number one pick game to introduce my friends to VR. Sure they were more like little  movies than a game but even with that it was still more fun to go through than this game. I particularly have found memory of the Stranger thing dlc. Now this one is just passable , very generic. I rarely come back to it, actually I never do compared to the first one that I used very often. They really messed up with that sequel. I do not think they realize what people loved in the first one at all. This feels absolutely nothing like the original, it's just blah. Original had a wonderful seat back and enjoy simplicity to it with various scenarios each representing a different type of Fear to face , hence the name but this one has only two scenarios that feels very similar. This had to be my biggest VR disappointment and I regretted buying it because it just was nothing like the first one. If you liked the first one just look elsewhere .Title is misleading as it does not have the various fears to face  the original had. Also it is just not fun to play. So,so disappointed and a little mad at the studio for erazing the first one out of existence.They do not realize what they had in the first one. Maybe they were just too ambitious ? I do not know.

I loved the first one played it since it came out and as soon as I saw the 2nd one came out I ran to charge my vr anyways the game was so scary and fun the jumpscares are great I never enjoyed a game that much since the first one

No clue what the negative reviews are on about, they’re mostly just about how much they want the first game back, love this game so much because I did both stories and when I replayed them I still find new jumpscares

Had this game originally before it was taken off the store and now that it’s back I’m so glad new people are able to run it up

The first Face Your Fear was way better then this one. Please bring the first on back. It had more options to choose from and it scared the hell out of people who have fears of clowns, Snakes, Spiders

I find myself bewildered by the current situation. The original version held a captivating simplicity that I deemed truly exceptional. The simulations within were not only enjoyable but also profoundly intriguing. It seems that in this follow-up iteration, an excessive ambition may have overshadowed the execution, resulting in a rather unsatisfactory outcome. I earnestly request a return to the accessibility and charm of the initial installment.

Be careful , this company stole all their customers paid content on face your fears 1 and locked all our paid content doors. They will not reply or respond to anyone’s requests so whose to say they won’t do the same on this new version . Too bad too, because face your fears 1 was an awesome game  until it ripped me off.

reviews.review_title: face your fears 2 but on uk
reviews.review_description: It isn’t In the uk but I live in the uk and in have the game
Not with it.  First was great to show to friend for quick scare this one but so much.
I used to own the older oculus and it had the face you fears game that included Stranger things, this game is a poor replacement. I would like a refund.

reviews.review_title: My view on the face your fears game
reviews.review_description:
Hi I’m sorry to say that I’m sure for some it’s really good but I didn’t find it that entertaining and it literally made me dizzy and feel nauseous but I was wondering could I cancel my purchase? I’m so sorry I don’t normally do this but I really have no use for it and I really would like to cancel my purchase and it would be nice to have the refund if possible.
Again I am sorry and thank you
amazing game. super scary

I purchased this because it sounded very interesting, however I only got roughly 5 min of gameplay in when I had to exit because I was so motion sick. This is the only game I’ve purchased that’s made me feel ill.

I absolutely loved the first face your fears and after reading the reviews I knew it wasn't going to be as good but I decided to give it a try after playing for about 30 minutes I had to put it down because I felt so nauseous and the game itself definitely wasn't worth feeling nauseous for so I would say definitely wouldn't recommend

After doing the oculus gear vr face your fears this was a total let down! I can’t say enough good about  the first one but this one I don’t even get it! I like the apps that take you through a scenario not what they did in this one! Very bummed!! I wish they would bring fyf 1 to quest 2! This one was a total let down unfortunately. Although I don’t want it to be all bad the scenes and stories were interesting! Please bring face your fears 1 over to quest 2!!! I’m sure a lot of people would love that
Very dissapionted with this so called game not a single bit scary at all
Just not fun!

Game can't be finished because of a game breaking bug which has caused the vital fuse to disappear. Tried to play the final "scare" sequence at least and ANOTHER bug prevents me from pulling a vital switch so I can't even do that. Utterly disappointed. One or two good scares but the true horror is that the game breaking bugs didn't show up until I had played for more than 2 hours and could no longer request a refund.

The morons who made this game made some of the controller actions unnecessarily painful. I love horror related stuff but this game made me just... I can't even... Don't buy. It is safe to say everybody was disgusted by this game. Give us Fear 1 for free for everyone that purchased Fear 2 or else forgot about us giving this developer a second chance

reviews.review_title: Bring the original FYF1 to the quest!!!
reviews.review_description: I played the original on Go on a friend’s party and love it! So, after purchasing the Quest I proceeded to find it and only discovered the second one available. I purchased it, played it and.... boy oh boy, what a deception :( The original was fun and quick to play with friends and first time VR players... I thought this will be the same but with more horror experiences, but no... just another puzzle walking simulator. I do not know why they change something so good and fresh for something so generic and boring. Please bring the original one to Quest!!!! And if there is a third one, please go back to the original formula and forget this second one under the carpet. This was heart breaking.

Walking in vr via joystick makes me sick. i cant play that. part 1 was awesome because there were no bad walking mechanic. i see that the devs tried to make an even better game than the original one but they should not have go for a walking game. the fun part about this game is showing it to frieds/family but without vr experience, its almost unplayable without someone permanentely giving instructions on the controls. at least you could have built one version without walking. would be much better

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! There are two different movement modes, "Head Directed" and "Hand Directed," which can have a big impact on comfort for some. Perhaps you'll find using a different movement mode more comfortable! Also we are working on a patch that will introduce a new mode where you can get directly into the scary experiences without story mode.

reviews.review_description: I love playing horror games, the first “real” one me playing being Resident Evil 7 I loved it. After my first playthrough I played a bit of it in virtual reality before having to return it to GameFly sadly. But experiencing horror in vr really got me excited when I found out about this game I bought it my second day with my quest. I am too scared to play for long periods of time I constantly work up the courage to play then exit 5-10 minutes later. That’s how you know it’s a good horror game (in my opinion). The only reason I’m giving 4/5 stars is because after trying both movement modes I would still feel a little nauseous. Overall this game is definitely worth a go. I do plan to beat it start to finish but maybe just not now.
Tried to play game 5 times and it would not get past the part to decide  to use your left hand or you turn your head. Not even good enough for one star.
It’s decent but I wouldn’t really play it sorry nice job though
this game is scary, fun, and mysterious. I recommend this game to people that like scary or puzzling games.
I don’t know who to communicate and what to do the game doesn’t load stay in black screen

developer_response.body: Please contact support and let us know if it starts working for you. https://support.oculus.com/885981024820727/

reviews.review_description: The very first time I was really scared by a VR game. I just recently bought my Quest (11/16) and I can truly say this is the best game I’ve played thus far, with that being said. I didn’t get too far because I was truly scared out of my mind, but the graphics and the interaction is on point. Shout out to the developers who put this together!!!
Had a fantastic time exploring these Resi like environments. Proper game and story. Looks great and plays great with effective jump scares.

developer_response.body: Awesome to hear this. Thank you for your review.

reviews.review_description: One of the first games I’ve bought, but the whole family had fun with it.  Got a few good scares and a lot of laughter from the spectators.
For some reason the game continues to show the three white circles as it’s loading and it never gets me to the actual game to play! Help

developer_response.body: Sorry this is happening to you- have you talked to support yet? If not can you try to uninstall and then re-install?

reviews.review_description: I love it
Love
Haven’t made it far .yet but so far soo good ! Will rate higher after played longer
Fantastic experience. Like starring in your very own horror movie. Incredibly immersive reaching forward to open doors and peeking around corners. Great fun. Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Super glad you enjoyed it.

reviews.review_description: I hate getting jumpscared but I love this game
